title: Does the "is between" date filter include the Start and End dates?
excerpt: I need to know if I should set my range to “is between June 30, 2023 and July 1, 2024” OR “is between July 1, 2023 and June 30, 2024” to get my fiscal year totals? Does the “is between” option INCLUDE the Start and End d…

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to know if I should set my range to “is between June 30, 2023 and July 1, 2024” OR “is between July 1, 2023 and June 30, 2024” to get my fiscal year totals? Does the “is between” option INCLUDE the Start and End dates or not?
